No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication or any of its targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to 'achieve fitness' (達到健身) and includes 'sports injury prevention' (運動傷害預防說明), directly supporting physical health and well-being (Target 3.4).
evidence: 達到健身、休閒、娛樂之目的 (achieve fitness, leisure, entertainment)
運動傷害預防說明 (sports injury prevention)

Quality Education.reason: As a 'Required' (修別：必) university course, it directly contributes to tertiary education (Target 4.3), providing a structured learning experience.
evidence: 科目名稱：體育[男女合班]—慢速壘球中級

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly designated as 'male and female' (男女合班), promoting equal participation in sports and education, directly aligning with Target 5.1 to end discrimination.
evidence: 體育[男女合班] (Physical Education [male and female])

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to water quality, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to employment, economic growth, or labor rights.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to infrastructure, industrialization, or innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The 'male and female' (男女合班) designation promotes social inclusion and equal opportunity irrespective of sex, directly supporting Target 10.2.
evidence: 體育[男女合班] (Physical Education [male and female])

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to urban development, housing, or public spaces.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to sustainable consumption, waste reduction, or resource efficiency.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or aquatic resources.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The objective to 'cultivate noble sports ethics' (培養高尚的運動道德) implies promoting fair play and adherence to rules, which has an inferred link to justice and rule of law (Target 16.3).
evidence: 培養高尚的運動道德及良好的團隊合作精神 (cultivate noble sports ethics and good teamwork spirit)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to global partnerships, financial resources, or technology transfer.
